name: @ggui-samples/gadget-mapbox
description: Reference ggui gadget wrapper around Mapbox GL JS (https://www.mapbox.com). Demonstrates the createGguiGadget SDK + the public env channel — declares `requires: ['GGUI_PUBLIC_APP_MAPBOX_TOKEN']` and reads the token via `getPublicEnv` LAZILY inside the hook body. Not published — sample only.
